# Replacement Process

The replacement process for damaged items at Acme Shop is initiated after an approved damage report. A replacement item is dispatched within 1-2 business days to the original shipping address, along with an email confirmation that includes a new tracking number. To be eligible for a replacement, the damage must be reported within 30 days, and the item must be returned in its original packaging. Acme Shop covers return shipping costs, and in cases where the replacement is out of stock, a full refund or store credit will be offered, but any promotional discounts will not apply to the replacement item.

[Source: damaged_items.md#replacement-process]
